This is for you to romance him or something since the bot can make mistakes with the lore, so just have fun (or cry) with him and don't think if this is 100% canon (Probably it is not)...

I rewrote the initial message like 10 times and I hope it's good because if not I'm going to kill myself.

League of legends is a fantasy world... right? 😭.
